title: [victreebel] Battle Guide
summary: A [grass]/[poison] physical sweeper whose [chlorophyll] doubles its Speed under sun — the physical counterpart to Venusaur on sun teams.
strengths: [sucker-punch] priority covers the non-sun fallback turn
weaknesses: Ice, [fire], Flying, and psychic weaknesses are stacked
80/65/70 bulk is fragile against neutral hits
Loses the win condition when sun is removed

recommendedMoves.reason: Setup move that doubles Attack into sweep range

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
[victreebel] is the physical counterpart to Venusaur on sun-based teams. It shares [chlorophyll] as its ability, which doubles Speed under sun, but its role is a physical sweeper rather than a special one. 105 Attack and a [swords-dance] setup turn make it an aggressive finisher that opens up after a sun-activated Speed boost.

## Strengths
Under sun, [chlorophyll] pushes Speed to an effective 140+ tier that outruns essentially the entire metagame. [swords-dance] doubles Attack into guaranteed OHKO ranges for [leaf-blade] and [poison-jab], and [sucker-punch] adds a priority finisher for the turns when sun is not active. The physical angle is what distinguishes [victreebel] from other [chlorophyll] sweepers in the format.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Ice, [fire], Flying, and psychic are all 2x weaknesses and common coverage moves, which limits [victreebel] safe entry points. 80/65/70 bulk fails against neutral priority, and losing the sun immediately shuts down the Speed win condition. Priority users are especially dangerous since [sucker-punch] can be read and baited by defensive plays.

## Recommended Moveset
[leaf-blade] is the locked [grass] STAB because its high crit rate and consistent damage serve the finisher role. [poison-jab] handles Fairies and mirror [grass] types. [sucker-punch] provides a priority slot for non-sun turns and answers to faster cleaners. [swords-dance] is the setup slot — one use is enough to kick off a legitimate sweep attempt. A knock-off variant trades finishing power for utility.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[life-orb] is the default damage item for the [swords-dance] set. [focus-sash] is the alternative that guarantees one setup turn, and [miracle-seed] is a niche pure-damage boost to [leaf-blade]. Ability is [chlorophyll] — gluttony is strictly worse. Tera [grass] maxes [leaf-blade] damage, and Tera [fire] flips Ice, [fire], and Flying weaknesses while adding offensive angles.

## Teammates & Synergy
[victreebel] pairs with a dedicated sun setter like Ninetales. A [fire] or Steel partner covers the Ice and Flying weaknesses, and a taunt lead or pivot line answers opposing weather setters. Hazard removal support keeps [victreebel] healthy across multiple entries, and a cleaner behind it converts its chip damage into KOs.

## Play Patterns
Let the sun setter lead, then bring [victreebel] in on turn two and [swords-dance] on a free turn. Open with [leaf-blade] on neutral matchups and [poison-jab] on Fairies, and use [sucker-punch] to finish fast cleaners. Tera on any telegraphed Ice or [fire] attack.
